title: MHRA Deficiency Grades & What They Mean
alt: The three MHRA deficiency grades and their consequences

items.label: Critical
items.desc: Harm risk to patient, or fraud/data falsification; triggers regulatory action

items.label: Major
items.desc: Non-compliant with MA, major GMP/GDP departure, or QP/release failure

items.label: Other (Minor)
items.desc: Departure from good practice; a cluster can escalate the grade
